title: Update cfg gates: remove wolfssl_openssl_extra from keywrap
description: After rewrite: (1) In wolfcrypt/src/lib.rs, change #[cfg(all(feature='keywrap', wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_aes_keywrap))] to #[cfg(all(feature='keywrap', wolfssl_aes_keywrap))]. (2) In wolfcrypt-conformance/tests/wycheproof_keywrap.rs, change #\![cfg(all(wolfssl_openssl_extra, wolfssl_aes_keywrap))] to #\![cfg(wolfssl_aes_keywrap)]. (3) Run cargo build -p wolfcrypt to verify no compile errors. (4) Run cargo test -p wolfcrypt-conformance --test wycheproof_keywrap to verify all Wycheproof vectors still pass.
